home.hero_badge: The calm studio tool for tutors
home.hero_body: fair-do brings your students, scheduling, secure video and payments together — simple enough to run from your phone, organised enough for the work you do.
home.hero_footnote: Free to start · set up in ~15 minutes · keep your own students
home.ethos_body: We think tutors deserve better tools — and fairer terms. fair-do grows when you grow. No lock-in, no games, and no agency taking a cut of every lesson.
home.benefits_sub: No more juggling a calendar, a payment app, a video tool and a spreadsheet. It's all here — and it's built to stay out of your way.

benefits.title: Your students stay yours
benefits.body: You own the relationship and the record. fair-do is your tool — never a middleman between you and the people you teach.

benefits.title: Genuinely simple
benefits.body: Set up in about 15 minutes — no tech skills needed. Import your student list, book a lesson, done. Plain-language help on every page.

benefits.title: Private by design
benefits.body: Encrypted, with UK/EU data residency and appropriate safeguards. You stay the data controller — in control of your students' information.

benefits.title: Set your own prices
benefits.body: Your rate, your hours, even a different price per student. You keep what you charge — fair-do is a simple monthly subscription, not a cut of every lesson.

benefits.title: Get paid automatically
benefits.body: Students pay by card; the money lands in your bank about two business days after each lesson. No chasing, no spreadsheets.

benefits.title: Runs from your phone
benefits.body: Add fair-do to your home screen and run your whole tutoring from a phone — no computer required.

steps.title: Add your students
steps.body: Invite them by email or import your whole list — set up in minutes.

steps.title: Book lessons
steps.body: Pick a time — we create a private video room and email your student automatically.

steps.title: Get paid
steps.body: Connect payments once; the money arrives in your bank after each lesson.

home.privacy_body: Your students trust you with their progress. We treat their information with care — encrypted, with UK/EU data residency, and never sold or shared. You remain the data controller, in control of your records, always.
home.cta_sub: Free to begin, fair as you grow. We'll set you up personally.

footer.tagline: The simple way for tutors to run their studio — your students, scheduling, secure video and payments in one place.
